name: vllm
_comment_c_seq: 40 µs/seq with seq_overlap_factor=0.0 and kernel_overlap_factor=0.3 — Python-heavy stack (eager-mode interpreter wraps each per-seq sampling decision). Midpoint of decode.md §7.2's 30-60 µs Python-heavy range. CUDA-Graph replay doesn't help because the CPU work is between graph launches; seq_overlap_factor=0 captures that the per-seq host loop serializes after the GPU compute window. The same interpreter-stall mechanism limits dispatch overlap to ~0.3 (lower end of the FrameworkSpec docstring's 0.3-0.6 eager-mode range for ρ_kernel).
